tasks.title: Room MIGRATION_15_16 + paired_bridges + DAO + WelcomeSplash + config/AppMode + Mode reentry
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-pair-shell/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/pair-shell.feature}. SECOND: add MIGRATION_15_16 to data/AppDatabase.kt (append per Article C-IV; current last is MIGRATION_14_15 from spec/002). Implement WelcomeSplashScreen alongside the 17 existing *Screen.kt files. Persist app.mode via config/AppMode.kt sibling to existing config/ConfigManager.kt. PairedBridgesDao as interface per Article C-VII (JVM-testable). Tests at FLAT layout per Article C-VIII.

tasks.title: PairScannerScreen + ECDH/CSR/HMAC pair-claim + Android Keystore storage
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-pair-shell/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/pair-shell.feature} AND meshsat/spec/001-pair-protocol/ for the bridge-side protocol contract. SECOND: implement ui/screens/PairScannerScreen.kt + crypto/PairClaimClient.kt + crypto/PairedClientKeystore.kt. Camera via CameraX + ZXing. Ed25519 sig verify with explicit "BC" provider per Article C-II. X25519 + Ed25519 keypairs generated in Android Keystore per Article C-V. TLS 1.3 via OkHttp with CertificatePinner pinning QR.fp. POST /api/v2/pair/claim per design.md contract. Persist cert + JWT + bridge metadata per Articles C-V + C-VI. Tests at FLAT layout per Article C-VIII.

tasks.title: HybridShell + SourceSwitcher + PinnedWebViewClient + per-source notifications + remove-pairing
tasks.prompt: FIRST: read spec/003-pair-shell/{requirements.md, design.md, acceptance/pair-shell.feature}. SECOND: implement ui/HybridShell.kt + ui/SourceSwitcher.kt + ui/SourceStore.kt + ui/web/PinnedWebViewClient.kt as new top-level files under ui/ (alongside existing ui/MeshSatUI.kt). Implement service/PerSourceNotifications.kt alongside existing service/GatewayService.kt. Implement data/RemovePairedBridge.kt that deletes Keystore alias + paired_bridges row + cascades paired_bridge_* rows. Compose Material 3 per Article C-IX. SourceStore is Kotlin shared store (Compose-state-friendly). WebView Authorization Bearer injection + SPKI pin verification per REQ-217/218.
